Read: plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, WFGADAX1-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/world-fs-granular-allow-deny-APPENDIX" TASK_ID="WFGADAX1-integ"

acceptance_criteria: Set: CORE_BRANCH="$(jq -r --arg id "WFGADAX1-integ-core" '.tasks[] | select(.id==$id) | .git_branch' "$FEATURE_DIR/tasks.json")"; CHECKOUT_SHA="$(git rev-parse "$CORE_BRANCH")"

Run: scripts/ci-audit/ci_audit.sh --ledger-path "$FEATURE_DIR/logs/WFGADAX1/ci-audit/ledger.jsonl" --kind ci-testing --orch-branch "$ORCH_REF" → exit 0 (record the RECOMMENDATION line(s) in session_log.md)

Run: scripts/ci-audit/ci_audit.sh --ledger-path "$FEATURE_DIR/logs/WFGADAX1/ci-audit/ledger.jsonl" --kind feature-smoke --orch-branch "$ORCH_REF" --feature-dir "$FEATURE_DIR" → exit 0 (record the RECOMMENDATION line(s) in session_log.md)
If ci-audit recommends RUN for ci-testing: Run: make ci-compile-parity CI_WORKFLOW_REF="$ORCH_REF" CI_REMOTE=origin CI_CLEANUP=1 CI_CHECKOUT_REF="$CHECKOUT_SHA" → exit 0

If ci-audit recommends RUN for feature-smoke: Run: make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="$FEATURE_DIR" PLATFORM=behavior SMOKE_SLICE_ID="$SMOKE_SLICE_ID" SMOKE_CHECKOUT_REF="$CHECKOUT_SHA" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="$ORCH_REF" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=0 → exit 0
If feature-smoke concludes failure: Run: make triad-task-start-platform-fixes-from-smoke FEATURE_DIR="$FEATURE_DIR" SLICE_ID="$SMOKE_SLICE_ID" SMOKE_RUN_ID="<run-id>" LAUNCH_CODEX=1
Record: session_log.md includes ORCH_REF, CHECKOUT_SHA, ci-audit output lines, and dispatched run URLs/ids (or explicit SKIP)
